title: selaginella roxburghii var. strigosa
intro: Selaginella roxburghii var. strigosa, also known as the spiny spike moss, is a type of evergreen, epiphytic plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, as well as its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Selaginella roxburghii var. strigosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
